title: leucanthemum tomentosum
intro: Leucanthemum tomentosum, also known as the Downy Woodland Daisy, is a perennial plant species in the Asteraceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, as it contains flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Leucanthemum tomentosum include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote overall well-being and support the body's natural healing processes.
